invalid_config.title: Invalid Configuration
invalid_config.description: Your custom provider configuration is invalid or no longer available. Please check your settings.
invalid_config.hint: Possible reasons: config disabled, API key expired, or deleted

panel.title: Provider Settings
panel.no_permission: This account can't manage provider configs. The list below shows shared configs already opened by the platform. Only super admins can add, edit, enable, or delete them.

volcengine.title: Volcengine / Doubao
volcengine.section_readonly_desc: Shared configs opened by the platform
volcengine.chat_desc: For Volcengine or Doubao chat/reasoning models.
volcengine.image_desc: For Volcengine or Doubao image models.

openai_compatible.title: OpenAI-Compatible
openai_compatible.section_manage_desc: Shared services compatible with the OpenAI API
openai_compatible.section_readonly_desc: Shared configs opened by the platform
openai_compatible.chat_desc: For chat/reasoning services compatible with the OpenAI API.
openai_compatible.image_desc: For image services compatible with the OpenAI API.

anthropic_compatible.title: Anthropic-Compatible
anthropic_compatible.section_manage_desc: Anthropic Messages-compatible shared services for Agent Brain
anthropic_compatible.section_readonly_desc: Agent Brain shared configs opened by the platform
anthropic_compatible.desc: For Agent Brain services compatible with the Anthropic Messages API.

form.connection_info_desc: Validate the API key, endpoint, and model name before saving this shared config.
form.enabled_desc: Turning it off keeps the credential stored, but it won't appear in model selection.
form.api_key_keep_existing: leave blank to keep the current key
form.display_desc: Used to distinguish configs in the model selector and settings panel.
form.delete_confirm_desc: This will remove the config and its stored credentials. This action can't be undone.
